_meta.crawl_limitations: Direct HTTP fetch of vlad-weby.sk was blocked at the sandbox proxy (403 CONNECT tunnel failed) for every URL attempted, including /sitemap.xml and /robots.txt, across both WebFetch and curl with browser User-Agents. As a result, full HTML bodies, complete heading trees, full hreflang tags, JSON-LD structured data, and complete image alt text could NOT be extracted. The inventory below is assembled from URLs and snippets that Google returned for site:vlad-weby.sk queries, which is a reliable proxy for indexable, SEO-relevant pages but is NOT a complete crawl. Before pointing the domain at the new site, this audit must be re-run from an environment that can actually fetch the live HTML.

pages_suspected_but_not_confirmed_indexe.reason: Site copy markets 'SK · EN · DE · RU' locales. No German pages were returned by Google site:vlad-weby.sk/de searches, but the locale may exist and be noindex'd, newly launched, or indexed under a non-obvious slug.
A live business site almost certainly has contact pages; none surfaced in search.
The EN site has a /blog/ subtree. It is reasonable to expect /sk/blog/* and /ru/blog/* to exist as indexed articles — none returned by search.
